description: You are a microbiologist studying the Bacillus subtilis sigma-A regulon. You need to discover novel genes regulated by this system by searching for the -10 Pribnow box promoter motif. Generate a probabilistic Position Weight Matrix (PWM) model from the aligned 15-bp sequences in ~/UGENE_Data/promoters/sigmaA_promoters.fasta and save the matrix file to ~/UGENE_Data/promoters/results/sigmaA_matrix.pwm. Use this matrix to search for putative promoter sites on both strands of the genomic region in ~/UGENE_Data/promoters/B_subtilis_target_region.fasta using a minimum score threshold of 85%. Export the resulting annotations in GFF3 format to ~/UGENE_Data/promoters/results/predicted_promoters.gff. Create a plain text summary report at ~/UGENE_Data/promoters/results/search_summary.txt that includes the name of the target genomic region, the 85% score threshold used, and the total number of putative promoter binding sites found.

metadata.data_source: Real Bacillus subtilis (AL009126.3) genomic sequence and experimentally verified sigma-A -10 promoter elements
